hero.name: Ronald Ferry NOUMSI NOUBISSI
hero.subtitle: Technical-Functional Consultant · IT Project Manager
hero.tagline: I design, customize and deploy Odoo solutions that automate business processes — from tailor-made Python modules to Docker/PostgreSQL production infrastructure.

about.title: About me
about.description: Odoo expert with 5+ years of experience developing, customizing and integrating ERP solutions (versions 8 to 18, Community and Enterprise). Founder of ZYGNIXIS, an ERP consulting and integration firm, I cover the full ERP lifecycle: functional analysis, custom module development, database-level debugging, Docker deployment, user training and production support. Currently pursuing a Master's in Information Systems Security (ENSPD), strengthening my expertise in securing ERP systems and infrastructure.

groups.name: Odoo development
items: Security rules, groups and record rules

groups.name: Database & diagnostics
items: Advanced PostgreSQL: direct SQL, production dump analysis

groups.name: Consulting & project management
items: Functional analysis and user story writing

list.name: Multi-site data isolation
list.description: Odoo security module isolating data by organizational unit (distribution centers): three-tier global rules driven by user groups, computed fields reflecting group membership, with no performance degradation.

list.name: Multi-instance Odoo deployments with Docker
list.description: Set up several isolated Odoo 15 instances on a single server (dedicated Odoo + PostgreSQL containers), restored production databases, resolved PostgreSQL shared-memory errors and sized workers.

list.name: ERP data forensics
list.description: Diagnosed discrepancies between sales, stock and invoicing reports on production databases: direct SQL on dumps, root-cause identification (delayed invoicing, missing links, double entries) and documented fixes.

list.name: Business report reliability
list.description: Fixed and aligned critical reports (stock statements, stock equation, sales by product and by salesperson): opening balance computations, inventory adjustment handling, cross-report consistency.

list.name: Odoo 14 → 15 module migration
list.description: Ported discount management modules (sales and purchases): adapted compute methods, QWeb views, tax API signatures and preserved invoice totals.

list.name: Product validation workflow
list.description: Complete two-level validation module (draft → submitted → validated/refused): dedicated security groups, refusal wizard with reason, duplicate prevention and chatter traceability.

responsibilities: Founded and lead an Odoo ERP consulting and integration firm

Direct SQL analysis on PostgreSQL databases for diagnostics and data reliability
Deploy and administer Odoo instances with Docker (test and production environments)
